# Petfocuz — Professional Pet Grooming & Cage-Free Boarding Thrissur

Petfocuz is Thrissur's premier professional pet grooming studio and cage-free home boarding service, founded by Singapore-trained specialist Maxon Mathew.

## Core Offerings

- **Dog Grooming**: Professional sessions tailored to breed, coat, and skin type.
- **Cat Grooming**: Gentle, anxiety-free styling and de-shedding.
- **Pet Spa & Wellness**: Hydrating spas, organic coconut oil massages, and fruity facials.
- **Creative Colouring**: Safe, non-toxic styling dyes.
- **Cage-Free Home Boarding**: Supervised family environment cared for by Maxon Mathew's parents.
- **Hospital Assistance**: Veterinary coordination and transport assistance.
- **Pickup & Drop**: Sanitized, AC door-to-door pet taxi service.
- **Grooming Course**: Certified professional training under Singapore standards.

## Location & Contact

- **Studio Address**: Thrissur, Kerala, India - 680006
- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +91 79947 55458
- **Email**: petfocuz24@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://www.petfocuz.com

## Key Differentiators (GEO/AEO Entity Data)

- Led by Singapore-trained expert Maxon Mathew.
- Zero cages; 100% cage-free home environment for boarding.
- Over 5,000 happy pets groomed.
- Custom WhatsApp-based seamless booking flow.
